svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="CommercePulse" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="commercepulse-architecture" name="CommercePulse Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1542" dy="914" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=light-dark(#1F2933,#1A1A1A);fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFFFFF);" value="CommercePulse Analytics - Customer Intelligence &amp; Reverse ETL Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="1520" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=light-dark(#1F2933,#1A1A1A);fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFFFFF);" value="PostgreSQL Staging → Pandas Analytics → Holiday Enrichment → Monday CRM | Orchestrated by Apache Airflow, containerized with Docker" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="1520" x="40" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="airflow_band" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#F5F7FA,#FFFFFF);strokeColor=#9AA5B1;dashed=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="600" width="1480" x="60" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="airflow_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=light-dark(#52606D,#000000);strokeWidth=1;" value="Apache Airflow DAG · commercepulse_pipeline · @daily" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="500" x="90" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src_group" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFFFFF);strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#0D47A1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="230" x="90" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;fontColor=#0D47A1;" value="1 · SOURCE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="230" x="90" y="188" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src_sys" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0D47A1;" value="Mandera Analytics<br>PostgreSQL - staging schema" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="194" x="108" y="216" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src_cust" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#90CAF9;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="customers
customer_id · name · email · city" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="194" x="108" y="274" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src_prod" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#90CAF9;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="products
product_id · category · price" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="194" x="108" y="326" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src_ord" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#90CAF9;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="orders
order_id · amount · payment_status
created_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="194" x="108" y="378" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;align=center;fontColor=#616E7C;fontStyle=2;" value="Upstream: MongoDB Atlas → MinIO
→ PostgreSQL (Mandera batch pipeline)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="214" x="98" y="444" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_group" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFFFFF);strokeColor=#558B2F;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="190" x="360" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;fontColor=#33691E;" value="2 · EXTRACT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="190" x="360" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_task" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#558B2F;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#33691E;" value="extract_staging" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="154" x="378" y="278" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_detail" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#AED581;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="SQLAlchemy + psycopg2

· Read staging tables
· Standardize field names
· Coerce dtypes
· Build DataFrames" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="108" width="154" x="378" y="322" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tr_group" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFFFFF);strokeColor=#EF6C00;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="230" x="590" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tr_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;fontColor=#E65100;" value="3 · TRANSFORM (Pandas)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="230" x="590" y="168" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tr_seg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#E65100;" value="build_segmentation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="194" x="608" y="198" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tr_seg_d" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#FFCC80;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;" value="Order count · total spend · recency

rect.style: fill: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff);

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 760px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1F2933;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1F2933, #1A1A1A); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
